```{r}
  # Generate individual chromosome plots
  plot_list <- list()
  
  for (chr in chromosomes) {
    cat("Creating concordance plot for chromosome:", chr, "\n")
    
    # Make plot
    chr_plot <- create_chromosome_concordance_plot(binned_data, chr)
    
    if (!is.null(chr_plot)) {
      plot_list[[chr]] <- chr_plot
      
      # Save individual plot as JPEG instead of PDF
      plot_file <- file.path(chr_plots_dir, paste0("concordance_chr", chr, ".jpg"))
      ggsave(plot_file, chr_plot, width = 10, height = 6, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
    }
  }
  
  # Create genome-wide summary plot (all chromosomes)
  combined_plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, "genome_wide_concordance.jpg")
  
  if (length(plot_list) > 0) {
    # Arrange multiple plots in a grid
    n_plots <- length(plot_list)
    n_cols <- min(3, n_plots)
    n_rows <- ceiling(n_plots / n_cols)
    
    combined_plot <- gridExtra::grid.arrange(
      grobs = plot_list,
      ncol = n_cols,
      nrow = n_rows,
      top = "Genome-Wide Gene Concordance Distribution"
    )
    
    # Save the combined plot as JPEG
    ggsave(combined_plot_file, combined_plot, width = 18, height = 12, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved genome-wide concordance plot to:", combined_plot_file, "\n")
  } else {
    cat("No chromosome plots were generated.\n")
  }
  
  # Create summary visualizations
  
  # 1. Chromosome bar plot - showing unique gene counts
  chr_summary_plot <- ggplot(chr_summary, aes(x = reorder(chromosome_name, discordant_count), 
                                             y = discordant_count)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "darkred", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = discordant_count), vjust = -0.3) +
    labs(
      title = "Discordant Genes by Chromosome",
      x = "Chromosome",
      y = "Number of Unique Discordant Genes"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
    )
  
  # Save chromosome summary plot as JPEG
  chr_summary_plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, "discordant_genes_by_chromosome.jpg")
  ggsave(chr_summary_plot_file, chr_summary_plot, width = 12, height = 8, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
  cat("Saved discordant genes by chromosome plot to:", chr_summary_plot_file, "\n")
  
  # 2. Calculate percentage of genes in each sample that are discordant
  sample_gene_counts <- lapply(names(cross_data), function(sample_id) {
    sample_result <- cross_data[[sample_id]]
    if (!is.null(sample_result$gene_similarities)) {
      total_genes <- nrow(sample_result$gene_similarities)
      
      # Check for sim_diet column
      if ("sim_diet" %in% colnames(sample_result$gene_similarities)) {
        discordant_count <- sum(sample_result$gene_similarities$sim_diet < similarity_threshold, na.rm = TRUE)
        
        return(data.frame(
          sample_id = sample_id,
          total_genes = total_genes,
          discordant_genes = discordant_count,
          pct_discordant = (discordant_count / total_genes) * 100
        ))
      } else {
        cat("Warning: 'sim_diet' column not found for sample", sample_id, "\n")
        return(NULL)
      }
    } else {
      return(NULL)
    }
  })
  
  # Combine sample gene counts
  sample_gene_counts <- do.call(rbind, sample_gene_counts[!sapply(sample_gene_counts, is.null)])
  
  if (!is.null(sample_gene_counts) && nrow(sample_gene_counts) > 0) {
    # Save sample gene counts
    sample_counts_file <- file.path(output_dir, "sample_discordance_summary.csv")
    write.csv(sample_gene_counts, sample_counts_file, row.names = FALSE)
    
    # Create sample discordance plot
    sample_plot <- ggplot(sample_gene_counts, aes(x = reorder(sample_id, pct_discordant), 
                                                 y = pct_discordant)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "purple", alpha = 0.7) +
      labs(
        title = "Percentage of Discordant Genes by Sample",
        x = "Sample ID",
        y = "% Discordant Genes"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
      )
    
    # Save sample plot as JPEG
    sample_plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, "sample_discordance_plot.jpg")
    ggsave(sample_plot_file, sample_plot, width = 12, height = 6, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved sample discordance plot to:", sample_plot_file, "\n")
  }
  
  # Return the processed data for further analysis if needed
  return(list(
    merged_data = merged_data,
    chr_summary = chr_summary,
    binned_data = binned_data,
    sample_summary = sample_gene_counts
  ))
}

# ============================================================================
# MAIN ANALYSIS FUNCTION
# ============================================================================

analyze_discordant_genes <- function(results_base_dir, 
                                    genes_with_id_path,
                                    similarity_threshold, 
                                    output_base_dir,
                                    target_cross = NULL,
                                    bin_size_mb = 5) {
  
  # Load gene coordinates
  cat("Loading gene coordinates...\n")
  gene_coords <- load_gene_coordinates(genes_with_id_path)
  
  # Load CCRIX results
  cat("Loading CCRIX analysis results...\n")
  results <- load_ccrix_results(results_base_dir, target_cross)
  
  # Create output directory if it doesn't exist
  if (!dir.exists(output_base_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_base_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    cat("Created output directory:", output_base_dir, "\n")
  }
  
  # Process each cross
  all_cross_results <- list()
  
  for (cross_type in names(results)) {
    if (length(results[[cross_type]]) == 0) {
      cat("No samples found for cross:", cross_type, "\n")
      next
    }
    
    # Skip if targeting a specific cross and this isn't it
    if (!is.null(target_cross) && target_cross != cross_type) {
      next
    }
    
    cat("\n==================================================\n")
    cat("Analyzing discordant genes for cross:", cross_type, "\n")
    cat("==================================================\n")
    
    # Create cross-specific output directory
    cross_output_dir <- file.path(output_base_dir, cross_type)
    if (!dir.exists(cross_output_dir)) {
      dir.create(cross_output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    }
    
    # Analyze this cross
    cross_result <- analyze_all_chromosomes(
      cross_data = results[[cross_type]],
      gene_coords = gene_coords,
      similarity_threshold = similarity_threshold,
      bin_size_mb = bin_size_mb,
      output_dir = cross_output_dir
    )
    
    # Store results
    if (!is.null(cross_result)) {
      all_cross_results[[cross_type]] <- cross_result
    }
  }
  
  # If there are multiple crosses, create a cross comparison
  if (length(all_cross_results) > 1) {
    cat("\nCreating cross comparison visualizations...\n")
    
    # Combine chromosome summaries from all crosses
    chr_summaries <- lapply(names(all_cross_results), function(cross) {
      summary <- all_cross_results[[cross]]$chr_summary
      summary$cross <- cross
      return(summary)
    })
    
    combined_chr_summary <- do.call(rbind, chr_summaries)
    
    # Create comparison plot
    comparison_plot <- ggplot(combined_chr_summary, 
                             aes(x = chromosome_name, y = discordant_count, fill = cross)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
      labs(
        title = "Discordant Gene Comparison Across Crosses",
        x = "Chromosome",
        y = "Number of Unique Discordant Genes",
        fill = "Cross"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
      )
    
    # Save comparison plot as JPEG
    comparison_plot_file <- file.path(output_base_dir, "cross_comparison_discordant_genes.jpg")
    ggsave(comparison_plot_file, comparison_plot, width = 14, height = 8, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved cross comparison plot to:", comparison_plot_file, "\n")
    
    # Save combined summary
    combined_summary_file <- file.path(output_base_dir, "combined_chromosome_summary.csv")
    write.csv(combined_chr_summary, combined_summary_file, row.names = FALSE)
    
    # Also create a concordance comparison if possible
    if (all(sapply(all_cross_results, function(x) !is.null(x$binned_data)))) {
      # Try to combine binned data for concordance comparison
      binned_data_list <- lapply(names(all_cross_results), function(cross) {
        binned <- all_cross_results[[cross]]$binned_data
        binned$cross <- cross
        return(binned)
      })
      
      combined_binned_data <- do.call(rbind, binned_data_list)
      
      # Save combined binned data
      combined_binned_file <- file.path(output_base_dir, "combined_binned_concordance_data.csv")
      write.csv(combined_binned_data, combined_binned_file, row.names = FALSE)
      
      # For each chromosome, create a comparison plot
      chromosomes <- unique(combined_binned_data$chromosome_name)
      
      # Create directory for comparison plots
      comparison_dir <- file.path(output_base_dir, "Cross_Comparisons")
      if (!dir.exists(comparison_dir)) {
        dir.create(comparison_dir, recursive = TRUE)
      }
      
      for (chr in chromosomes) {
        # Filter data for this chromosome
        chr_data <- combined_binned_data %>%
          dplyr::filter(chromosome_name == chr, !is.na(pct_concordance))
        
        if (nrow(chr_data) > 0) {
          # Create comparison plot
          comp_plot <- ggplot(chr_data, aes(x = position_bin, y = pct_concordance, color = cross, group = cross)) +
            geom_line(size = 1) +
            geom_point(size = 1.5) +
            ylim(0, 100) +
            labs(
              title = paste0("Concordance Comparison - Chromosome ", chr),
              x = "Chromosome Position (Mb)",
              y = "% Concordance",
              color = "Cross"
            ) +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(
              plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
            )
          
          # Save comparison plot as JPEG
          comp_plot_file <- file.path(comparison_dir, paste0("concordance_comparison_chr", chr, ".jpg"))
          ggsave(comp_plot_file, comp_plot, width = 12, height = 8, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
          cat("Saved concordance comparison for chromosome", chr, "to:", comp_plot_file, "\n")
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Generate a summary report
  cat("\nGenerating summary report...\n")
  
  report_file <- file.path(output_base_dir, "discordant_genes_report.txt")
  sink(report_file)
  
  cat("Discordant Gene Analysis Report\n")
  cat("===============================\n\n")
  cat("Analysis Date:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
  cat("Similarity Threshold:", similarity_threshold, "\n")
  cat("Bin Size:", bin_size_mb, "Mb\n\n")
  
  for (cross_type in names(all_cross_results)) {
    cat("\n---------------------------------------\n")
    cat("Cross:", cross_type, "\n")
    cat("---------------------------------------\n")
    
    cross_result <- all_cross_results[[cross_type]]
    
    # Get unique gene count
    unique_genes <- unique(cross_result$merged_data$gene)
    total_discordant <- length(unique_genes)
    
    cat("Total Unique Discordant Genes:", total_discordant, "\n\n")
    
    # Chromosome breakdown
    cat("Chromosome Breakdown:\n")
    print(cross_result$chr_summary[, c("chromosome_name", "discordant_count", "avg_sample_count")])
    
    # Top 5 bins with highest concordance
    if (!is.null(cross_result$binned_data)) {
      top_concordant_bins <- cross_result$binned_data %>%
        dplyr::filter(total_gene_count >= 5) %>%  # Only include bins with at least 5 genes
        dplyr::arrange(desc(pct_concordance)) %>%
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 5)
      
      # Top 5 bins with lowest concordance
      bottom_concordant_bins <- cross_result$binned_data %>%
        dplyr::filter(total_gene_count >= 5) %>%  # Only include bins with at least 5 genes
        dplyr::arrange(pct_concordance) %>%
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 5)
      
      cat("\nTop 5 Regions with Highest Concordance (min 5 genes):\n")
      print(top_concordant_bins[, c("chromosome_name", "position_bin_label", "total_gene_count", "pct_concordance")])
      
      cat("\nTop 5 Regions with Lowest Concordance (min 5 genes):\n")
      print(bottom_concordant_bins[, c("chromosome_name", "position_bin_label", "total_gene_count", "pct_concordance")])
    }
    
    cat("\n")
    
    # Sample statistics - if available
    if (!is.null(cross_result$sample_summary) && nrow(cross_result$sample_summary) > 0) {
      cat("\nSample Summary Statistics:\n")
      cat("Average % of discordant genes per sample:", 
          round(mean(cross_result$sample_summary$pct_discordant), 2), "%\n")
      cat("Range of % discordant genes:", 
          round(min(cross_result$sample_summary$pct_discordant), 2), "% to",
          round(max(cross_result$sample_summary$pct_discordant), 2), "%\n")
    }
  }
  
  sink()
  cat("Summary report generated at:", report_file, "\n")
  
  cat("\n==================================================\n")
  cat("Discordant gene analysis completed successfully!\n")
  cat("Output files are in:", output_base_dir, "\n")
  cat("==================================================\n")
  
  return(all_cross_results)
}

# ============================================================================
# RUN THE ANALYSIS
# ============================================================================

# Execute the analysis with the parameters defined at the top of the script
discordant_results <- analyze_discordant_genes(
  results_base_dir = results_base_dir,
  genes_with_id_path = genes_with_id_path,
  similarity_threshold = similarity_threshold,
  output_base_dir = output_base_dir,
  target_cross = target_cross,
  bin_size_mb = bin_size_mb
)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================================
# Discordant Gene Analysis for CCRIX Data
# ============================================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(gridExtra)

# ============================================================================
# CONFIGURATION - MODIFY THESE PARAMETERS
# ============================================================================

# Base directory where CCRIX analysis results are stored
results_base_dir <- "Data/CCDiet/CCDiet_Comparison/RIX/Analysis"

genes_with_id_path <- NULL  # Set to NULL if genes_with_id is already in the environment

# Similarity threshold below which a gene is considered discordant
similarity_threshold <- 0.7

# Output directory for discordant gene analysis
output_base_dir <- "Data/CCDiet/CCDiet_Comparison/RIX/Analysis/Discordant"

# Optional: Specify a single cross to analyze (e.g., "CC001xCC019")
# Set to NULL to analyze all crosses
target_cross <- NULL

# Bin size for chromosome position binning (in Mb)
bin_size_mb <- 5

# ============================================================================
# HELPER FUNCTIONS
# ============================================================================

# Function to load gene coordinates if not already in environment
load_gene_coordinates <- function(genes_with_id_path) {
  if (!is.null(genes_with_id_path) && file.exists(genes_with_id_path)) {
    return(readRDS(genes_with_id_path))
  } else if (exists("genes_with_id")) {
    return(get("genes_with_id"))
  } else {
    stop("Gene coordinates not found. Please provide a valid path or ensure 'genes_with_id' is loaded.")
  }
}

# Function to load CCRIX analysis results
load_ccrix_results <- function(results_base_dir, target_cross = NULL) {
  # If target_cross is specified, load only that cross's results
  if (!is.null(target_cross)) {
    # Look directly in the cross-specific directory
    cross_dir <- file.path(results_base_dir, target_cross, "Cosine")
    results_file <- file.path(cross_dir, paste0(target_cross, "_cosine_raw_results.rds"))
    
    if (file.exists(results_file)) {
      cat("Loading results for cross", target_cross, "from", results_file, "\n")
      results <- list()
      results[[target_cross]] <- readRDS(results_file)
      return(results)
    } else {
      stop("Results file not found for cross: ", target_cross, " at path: ", results_file)
    }
  } else {
    # Load all crosses
    results <- list()
    cross_dirs <- list.dirs(results_base_dir, full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE)
    
    for (cross in cross_dirs) {
      if (grepl("^CC\\d+xCC\\d+$", cross)) {  # Only process directories that look like crosses
        cross_file <- file.path(results_base_dir, cross, "Cosine", paste0(cross, "_cosine_raw_results.rds"))
        if (file.exists(cross_file)) {
          cat("Loading results for cross", cross, "from", cross_file, "\n")
          results[[cross]] <- readRDS(cross_file)
        }
      }
    }
    
    if (length(results) > 0) {
      return(results)
    } else {
      stop("No CCRIX analysis results found in:", results_base_dir)
    }
  }
}

# Function to identify discordant genes for a sample
identify_sample_discordant_genes <- function(sample_result, similarity_threshold) {
  if (is.null(sample_result) || is.null(sample_result$gene_similarities)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Get gene similarities
  gene_data <- sample_result$gene_similarities
  
  # Identify discordant genes (those with similarity below threshold)
  discordant_genes <- gene_data %>%
    dplyr::filter(sim_combined < similarity_threshold) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sample_id = sample_result$sample_id
    )
  
  return(discordant_genes)
}

# Function to merge discordant genes with genomic coordinates
merge_discordant_with_coordinates <- function(discordant_genes, gene_coords) {
  # Standardize gene identifiers
  gene_coords$gene_id <- gene_coords$ensembl_gene_id
  
  # For each gene in discordant_genes, find its coordinates
  merged_data <- discordant_genes %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      gene_coords %>% 
        dplyr::select(gene_id, chromosome_name, start_position, end_position),
      by = c("gene" = "gene_id")
    )
  
  # Calculate gene midpoint position in Mb
  merged_data <- merged_data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      midpoint_mb = (start_position + end_position) / 2000000,  # Convert to Mb
      chromosome_name = as.character(chromosome_name)
    )
  
  return(merged_data)
}

# Modified function to calculate concordance percentage by bin
bin_chromosome_positions <- function(merged_data, all_genes_by_chr, bin_size_mb = 5) {
  # First, identify unique discordant genes and their positions
  unique_discordant_genes <- merged_data %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, chromosome_name, midpoint_mb) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()
  
  # Create bins for all chromosomes present in the data
  chromosomes <- unique(unique_discordant_genes$chromosome_name)
  
  # Create a list to store results for each chromosome
  binned_results <- list()
  
  for (chr in chromosomes) {
    # Get all genes for this chromosome from the reference
    chr_all_genes <- all_genes_by_chr[[chr]]
    if (is.null(chr_all_genes) || length(chr_all_genes) == 0) {
      next
    }
    
    # Get discordant genes for this chromosome
    chr_discordant_genes <- unique_discordant_genes %>%
      dplyr::filter(chromosome_name == chr)
    
    # Calculate min and max positions based on all genes in the chromosome
    min_pos <- floor(min(chr_all_genes$midpoint_mb) / bin_size_mb) * bin_size_mb
    max_pos <- ceiling(max(chr_all_genes$midpoint_mb) / bin_size_mb) * bin_size_mb
    
    # Create bins from min to max position
    bins <- seq(min_pos, max_pos, by = bin_size_mb)
    
    # Initialize bin data
    bin_data <- data.frame(
      chromosome_name = chr,
      position_bin = bins,
      position_bin_label = paste0(bins, "-", bins + bin_size_mb),
      total_gene_count = 0,
      discordant_count = 0,
      pct_concordance = 0
    )
    
    # Count total genes in each bin
    for (i in 1:length(bins)) {
      bin_start <- bins[i]
      bin_end <- bin_start + bin_size_mb
      
      # Count all genes in this bin
      bin_data$total_gene_count[i] <- sum(
        chr_all_genes$midpoint_mb >= bin_start & 
        chr_all_genes$midpoint_mb < bin_end
      )
      
      # Count discordant genes in this bin
      bin_data$discordant_count[i] <- sum(
        chr_discordant_genes$midpoint_mb >= bin_start & 
        chr_discordant_genes$midpoint_mb < bin_end
      )
    }
    
    # Calculate concordance percentage (avoiding division by zero)
    bin_data <- bin_data %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        pct_concordance = ifelse(
          total_gene_count > 0,
          100 * (1 - (discordant_count / total_gene_count)),
          NA
        )
      )
    
    # Store results for this chromosome
    binned_results[[chr]] <- bin_data
  }
  
  # Combine all chromosome results
  binned_data <- do.call(rbind, binned_results)
  
  return(binned_data)
}

# Function to create chromosome position plots with concordance percentage
create_chromosome_concordance_plot <- function(binned_data, chromosome, title = NULL) {
  # Filter data for the specified chromosome
  chr_data <- binned_data %>%
    dplyr::filter(chromosome_name == chromosome) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(pct_concordance))  # Remove bins with no genes
  
  # If no data for this chromosome, return NULL
  if (nrow(chr_data) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Create plot
  plot_title <- ifelse(
    is.null(title),
    paste0("Gene Concordance Distribution - Chromosome ", chromosome),
    title
  )
  
  p <- ggplot(chr_data, aes(x = position_bin, y = pct_concordance)) +
    geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2, color = "blue") +
    ylim(0, 100) +
    labs(
      title = plot_title,
      x = "Chromosome Position (Mb)",
      y = "% Concordance"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# Function to analyze discordant genes across all chromosomes
analyze_all_chromosomes <- function(cross_data, gene_coords, similarity_threshold, bin_size_mb,
                                   output_dir) {
  # Create list to store all discordant genes
  all_discordant <- list()
  
  # Process each sample
  for (sample_id in names(cross_data)) {
    cat("Processing sample:", sample_id, "\n")
    sample_result <- cross_data[[sample_id]]
    
    # Identify discordant genes
    discordant_genes <- identify_sample_discordant_genes(sample_result, similarity_threshold)
    
    if (!is.null(discordant_genes) && nrow(discordant_genes) > 0) {
      all_discordant[[sample_id]] <- discordant_genes
    }
  }
  
  # Combine all discordant genes
  if (length(all_discordant) == 0) {
    cat("No discordant genes found for any sample.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  combined_discordant <- do.call(rbind, all_discordant)
  
  # Merge with genomic coordinates
  merged_data <- merge_discordant_with_coordinates(combined_discordant, gene_coords)
  
  # Save the complete merged data
  full_data_file <- file.path(output_dir, "all_discordant_genes_with_coords.csv")
  write.csv(merged_data, full_data_file, row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Saved all discordant genes with coordinates to:", full_data_file, "\n")
  
  # Filter out entries with missing chromosomes or positions
  valid_data <- merged_data %>% 
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(chromosome_name) & !is.na(midpoint_mb))
  
  if (nrow(valid_data) == 0) {
    cat("No valid chromosome coordinate data found for discordant genes.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Prepare all genes with chromosome positions (for denominator in concordance calculation)
  all_genes_by_chr <- gene_coords %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      midpoint_mb = (start_position + end_position) / 2000000,  # Convert to Mb
      chromosome_name = as.character(chromosome_name)
    ) %>%
    split(.$chromosome_name)
  
  # Count unique discordant genes by chromosome
  chr_summary <- valid_data %>%
    dplyr::group_by(chromosome_name, gene) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      sample_count = n_distinct(sample_id),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(chromosome_name) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      discordant_count = n(),  # Count unique genes, not sample×gene combinations
      avg_sample_count = mean(sample_count, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(chromosome_name)
  
  # Save chromosome summary
  chr_summary_file <- file.path(output_dir, "chromosome_discordance_summary.csv")
  write.csv(chr_summary, chr_summary_file, row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Saved chromosome discordance summary to:", chr_summary_file, "\n")
  
  # Create binned data for visualization with concordance percentage
  binned_data <- bin_chromosome_positions(valid_data, all_genes_by_chr, bin_size_mb)
  
  # Save binned data
  binned_data_file <- file.path(output_dir, "binned_concordance_data.csv")
  write.csv(binned_data, binned_data_file, row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Create individual chromosome plots
  chromosomes <- unique(valid_data$chromosome_name)
  chromosomes <- sort(chromosomes)  # Sort chromosomes
  
  # Create a directory for chromosome plots
  chr_plots_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "Chromosome_Plots")
  if (!dir.exists(chr_plots_dir)) {
    dir.create(chr_plots_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Generate individual chromosome plots
  plot_list <- list()
  
  for (chr in chromosomes) {
    cat("Creating concordance plot for chromosome:", chr, "\n")
    
    # Make plot
    chr_plot <- create_chromosome_concordance_plot(binned_data, chr)
    
    if (!is.null(chr_plot)) {
      plot_list[[chr]] <- chr_plot
      
      # Save individual plot as JPEG instead of PDF
      plot_file <- file.path(chr_plots_dir, paste0("concordance_chr", chr, ".jpg"))
      ggsave(plot_file, chr_plot, width = 10, height = 6, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
    }
  }
  
  # Create genome-wide summary plot (all chromosomes)
  combined_plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, "genome_wide_concordance.jpg")
  
  if (length(plot_list) > 0) {
    # Arrange multiple plots in a grid
    n_plots <- length(plot_list)
    n_cols <- min(3, n_plots)
    n_rows <- ceiling(n_plots / n_cols)
    
    combined_plot <- gridExtra::grid.arrange(
      grobs = plot_list,
      ncol = n_cols,
      nrow = n_rows,
      top = "Genome-Wide Gene Concordance Distribution"
    )
    
    # Save the combined plot as JPEG
    ggsave(combined_plot_file, combined_plot, width = 18, height = 12, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved genome-wide concordance plot to:", combined_plot_file, "\n")
  } else {
    cat("No chromosome plots were generated.\n")
  }
  
  # Create summary visualizations
  
  # 1. Chromosome bar plot - showing unique gene counts
  chr_summary_plot <- ggplot(chr_summary, aes(x = reorder(chromosome_name, discordant_count), 
                                             y = discordant_count)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "darkred", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = discordant_count), vjust = -0.3) +
    labs(
      title = "Discordant Genes by Chromosome",
      x = "Chromosome",
      y = "Number of Unique Discordant Genes"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
    )
  
  # Save chromosome summary plot as JPEG
  chr_summary_plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, "discordant_genes_by_chromosome.jpg")
  ggsave(chr_summary_plot_file, chr_summary_plot, width = 12, height = 8, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
  cat("Saved discordant genes by chromosome plot to:", chr_summary_plot_file, "\n")
  
  # 2. Calculate percentage of genes in each sample that are discordant
  sample_gene_counts <- lapply(names(cross_data), function(sample_id) {
    sample_result <- cross_data[[sample_id]]
    if (!is.null(sample_result$gene_similarities)) {
      total_genes <- nrow(sample_result$gene_similarities)
      discordant_count <- sum(sample_result$gene_similarities$sim_combined < similarity_threshold, na.rm = TRUE)
      return(data.frame(
        sample_id = sample_id,
        total_genes = total_genes,
        discordant_genes = discordant_count,
        pct_discordant = (discordant_count / total_genes) * 100
      ))
    } else {
      return(NULL)
    }
  })
  
  # Combine sample gene counts
  sample_gene_counts <- do.call(rbind, sample_gene_counts[!sapply(sample_gene_counts, is.null)])
  
  if (!is.null(sample_gene_counts) && nrow(sample_gene_counts) > 0) {
    # Save sample gene counts
    sample_counts_file <- file.path(output_dir, "sample_discordance_summary.csv")
    write.csv(sample_gene_counts, sample_counts_file, row.names = FALSE)
    
    # Create sample discordance plot
    sample_plot <- ggplot(sample_gene_counts, aes(x = reorder(sample_id, pct_discordant), 
                                                 y = pct_discordant)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "purple", alpha = 0.7) +
      labs(
        title = "Percentage of Discordant Genes by Sample",
        x = "Sample ID",
        y = "% Discordant Genes"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
      )
    
    # Save sample plot as JPEG
    sample_plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, "sample_discordance_plot.jpg")
    ggsave(sample_plot_file, sample_plot, width = 12, height = 6, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved sample discordance plot to:", sample_plot_file, "\n")
  }
  
  # Return the processed data for further analysis if needed
  return(list(
    merged_data = merged_data,
    chr_summary = chr_summary,
    binned_data = binned_data,
    sample_summary = sample_gene_counts
  ))
}

# ============================================================================
# MAIN ANALYSIS FUNCTION
# ============================================================================

analyze_discordant_genes <- function(results_base_dir, 
                                    genes_with_id_path,
                                    similarity_threshold, 
                                    output_base_dir,
                                    target_cross = NULL,
                                    bin_size_mb = 5) {
  
  # Load gene coordinates
  cat("Loading gene coordinates...\n")
  gene_coords <- load_gene_coordinates(genes_with_id_path)
  
  # Load CCRIX results
  cat("Loading CCRIX analysis results...\n")
  results <- load_ccrix_results(results_base_dir, target_cross)
  
  # Create output directory if it doesn't exist
  if (!dir.exists(output_base_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_base_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    cat("Created output directory:", output_base_dir, "\n")
  }
  
  # Process each cross
  all_cross_results <- list()
  
  for (cross_type in names(results)) {
    if (length(results[[cross_type]]) == 0) {
      cat("No samples found for cross:", cross_type, "\n")
      next
    }
    
    # Skip if targeting a specific cross and this isn't it
    if (!is.null(target_cross) && target_cross != cross_type) {
      next
    }
    
    cat("\n==================================================\n")
    cat("Analyzing discordant genes for cross:", cross_type, "\n")
    cat("==================================================\n")
    
    # Create cross-specific output directory
    cross_output_dir <- file.path(output_base_dir, cross_type)
    if (!dir.exists(cross_output_dir)) {
      dir.create(cross_output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    }
    
    # Analyze this cross
    cross_result <- analyze_all_chromosomes(
      cross_data = results[[cross_type]],
      gene_coords = gene_coords,
      similarity_threshold = similarity_threshold,
      bin_size_mb = bin_size_mb,
      output_dir = cross_output_dir
    )
    
    # Store results
    if (!is.null(cross_result)) {
      all_cross_results[[cross_type]] <- cross_result
    }
  }
  
  # If there are multiple crosses, create a cross comparison
  if (length(all_cross_results) > 1) {
    cat("\nCreating cross comparison visualizations...\n")
    
    # Combine chromosome summaries from all crosses
    chr_summaries <- lapply(names(all_cross_results), function(cross) {
      summary <- all_cross_results[[cross]]$chr_summary
      summary$cross <- cross
      return(summary)
    })
    
    combined_chr_summary <- do.call(rbind, chr_summaries)
    
    # Create comparison plot
    comparison_plot <- ggplot(combined_chr_summary, 
                             aes(x = chromosome_name, y = discordant_count, fill = cross)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
      labs(
        title = "Discordant Gene Comparison Across Crosses",
        x = "Chromosome",
        y = "Number of Unique Discordant Genes",
        fill = "Cross"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
      )
    
    # Save comparison plot as JPEG
    comparison_plot_file <- file.path(output_base_dir, "cross_comparison_discordant_genes.jpg")
    ggsave(comparison_plot_file, comparison_plot, width = 14, height = 8, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved cross comparison plot to:", comparison_plot_file, "\n")
    
    # Save combined summary
    combined_summary_file <- file.path(output_base_dir, "combined_chromosome_summary.csv")
    write.csv(combined_chr_summary, combined_summary_file, row.names = FALSE)
    
    # Also create a concordance comparison if possible
    if (all(sapply(all_cross_results, function(x) !is.null(x$binned_data)))) {
      # Try to combine binned data for concordance comparison
      binned_data_list <- lapply(names(all_cross_results), function(cross) {
        binned <- all_cross_results[[cross]]$binned_data
        binned$cross <- cross
        return(binned)
      })
      
      combined_binned_data <- do.call(rbind, binned_data_list)
      
      # Save combined binned data
      combined_binned_file <- file.path(output_base_dir, "combined_binned_concordance_data.csv")
      write.csv(combined_binned_data, combined_binned_file, row.names = FALSE)
      
      # For each chromosome, create a comparison plot
      chromosomes <- unique(combined_binned_data$chromosome_name)
      
      # Create directory for comparison plots
      comparison_dir <- file.path(output_base_dir, "Cross_Comparisons")
      if (!dir.exists(comparison_dir)) {
        dir.create(comparison_dir, recursive = TRUE)
      }
      
      for (chr in chromosomes) {
        # Filter data for this chromosome
        chr_data <- combined_binned_data %>%
          dplyr::filter(chromosome_name == chr, !is.na(pct_concordance))
        
        if (nrow(chr_data) > 0) {
          # Create comparison plot
          comp_plot <- ggplot(chr_data, aes(x = position_bin, y = pct_concordance, color = cross, group = cross)) +
            geom_line(size = 1) +
            geom_point(size = 1.5) +
            ylim(0, 100) +
            labs(
              title = paste0("Concordance Comparison - Chromosome ", chr),
              x = "Chromosome Position (Mb)",
              y = "% Concordance",
              color = "Cross"
            ) +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(
              plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
            )
          
          # Save comparison plot as JPEG
          comp_plot_file <- file.path(comparison_dir, paste0("concordance_comparison_chr", chr, ".jpg"))
          ggsave(comp_plot_file, comp_plot, width = 12, height = 8, device = "jpeg", dpi = 300)
          cat("Saved concordance comparison for chromosome", chr, "to:", comp_plot_file, "\n")
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Generate a summary report
  cat("\nGenerating summary report...\n")
  
  report_file <- file.path(output_base_dir, "discordant_genes_report.txt")
  sink(report_file)
  
  cat("Discordant Gene Analysis Report\n")
  cat("===============================\n\n")
  cat("Analysis Date:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
  cat("Similarity Threshold:", similarity_threshold, "\n")
  cat("Bin Size:", bin_size_mb, "Mb\n\n")
  
  for (cross_type in names(all_cross_results)) {
    cat("\n---------------------------------------\n")
    cat("Cross:", cross_type, "\n")
    cat("---------------------------------------\n")
    
    cross_result <- all_cross_results[[cross_type]]
    
    # Get unique gene count
    unique_genes <- unique(cross_result$merged_data$gene)
    total_discordant <- length(unique_genes)
    
    cat("Total Unique Discordant Genes:", total_discordant, "\n\n")
    
    # Chromosome breakdown
    cat("Chromosome Breakdown:\n")
    print(cross_result$chr_summary[, c("chromosome_name", "discordant_count", "avg_sample_count")])
    
    # Top 5 bins with highest concordance
    if (!is.null(cross_result$binned_data)) {
      top_concordant_bins <- cross_result$binned_data %>%
        dplyr::filter(total_gene_count >= 5) %>%  # Only include bins with at least 5 genes
        dplyr::arrange(desc(pct_concordance)) %>%
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 5)
      
      # Top 5 bins with lowest concordance
      bottom_concordant_bins <- cross_result$binned_data %>%
        dplyr::filter(total_gene_count >= 5) %>%  # Only include bins with at least 5 genes
        dplyr::arrange(pct_concordance) %>%
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 5)
      
      cat("\nTop 5 Regions with Highest Concordance (min 5 genes):\n")
      print(top_concordant_bins[, c("chromosome_name", "position_bin_label", "total_gene_count", "pct_concordance")])
      
      cat("\nTop 5 Regions with Lowest Concordance (min 5 genes):\n")
      print(bottom_concordant_bins[, c("chromosome_name", "position_bin_label", "total_gene_count", "pct_concordance")])
    }
    
    cat("\n")
    
    # Sample statistics - if available
    if (!is.null(cross_result$sample_summary) && nrow(cross_result$sample_summary) > 0) {
      cat("\nSample Summary Statistics:\n")
      cat("Average % of discordant genes per sample:", 
          round(mean(cross_result$sample_summary$pct_discordant), 2), "%\n")
      cat("Range of % discordant genes:", 
          round(min(cross_result$sample_summary$pct_discordant), 2), "% to",
          round(max(cross_result$sample_summary$pct_discordant), 2), "%\n")
    }
  }
  
  sink()
  cat("Summary report generated at:", report_file, "\n")
  
  cat("\n==================================================\n")
  cat("Discordant gene analysis completed successfully!\n")
  cat("Output files are in:", output_base_dir, "\n")
  cat("==================================================\n")
  
  return(all_cross_results)
}

# ============================================================================
# RUN THE ANALYSIS
# ============================================================================

# Execute the analysis with the parameters defined at the top of the script
discordant_results <- analyze_discordant_genes(
  results_base_dir = results_base_dir,
  genes_with_id_path = genes_with_id_path,
  similarity_threshold = similarity_threshold,
  output_base_dir = output_base_dir,
  target_cross = target_cross,
  bin_size_mb = bin_size_mb
)
```

## 12. Combined visualization of discordant genes

```{r}
################################################################################
# Contrast 3: Jax vs Bennett Genotype Discordant Gene Analysis
# Standalone script for comparing Jax Consensus vs Bennett Lab genotypes
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# ============================================================================
# CONFIGURATION
# ============================================================================

# Base directory
base_dir <- "/project/do2_projects/AFRI/GBRS_development/Development"

# Output directory for Contrast 3 results
output_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "Results/Discordant_Comparison/Contrast3_Jax_vs_Bennett")

# Strain mapping
cc_pairs <- list(
  "CC001/Unc" = "CC-276",
  "CC019/TauUnc" = "CC-309",
  "CC040/TauUnc" = "CC-284"
)

# Mapping between cross names and strain names
cross_to_jax <- c(
  "CC001xCC001" = "CC001/Unc",
  "CC019xCC019" = "CC019/TauUnc",
  "CC040xCC040" = "CC040/TauUnc"
)

# Similarity threshold for identifying discordant genes
similarity_threshold <- 0.7

# Bin size for genomic analysis (in Mb)
bin_size_mb <- 5

# ============================================================================
# HELPER FUNCTIONS
# ============================================================================

# Load gene coordinates
load_gene_coordinates <- function() {
  if (exists("genes_with_id")) {
    gene_coords <- get("genes_with_id", envir = .GlobalEnv)
    
    # Filter to only include standard chromosomes (1-19, X, Y, MT)
    valid_chrs <- c(as.character(1:19), "X", "Y", "MT")
    gene_coords <- gene_coords %>%
      dplyr::filter(chromosome_name %in% valid_chrs)
    
    cat("Filtered gene coordinates to standard chromosomes (1-19, X, Y, MT)\n")
    cat("Total genes after filtering:", nrow(gene_coords), "\n")
    
    return(gene_coords)
  } else {
    stop("Gene coordinates (genes_with_id) not found in environment.")
  }
}

# Extract strain probabilities from interpolated probabilities
extract_strain_probs <- function(interpolated_probs, strain_name, gene_ids = NULL) {
  all_genes <- c()
  
  if (is.null(gene_ids)) {
    for (chr in names(interpolated_probs)) {
      all_genes <- c(all_genes, dimnames(interpolated_probs[[chr]])[[3]])
    }
    gene_ids <- unique(all_genes)
  }
  
  strain_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = length(gene_ids), ncol = 8)
  rownames(strain_matrix) <- gene_ids
  colnames(strain_matrix) <- LETTERS[1:8]
  
  for (chr in names(interpolated_probs)) {
    strain_idx <- which(dimnames(interpolated_probs[[chr]])[[1]] == strain_name)
    
    if (length(strain_idx) > 0) {
      chr_genes <- intersect(gene_ids, dimnames(interpolated_probs[[chr]])[[3]])
      
      for (gene in chr_genes) {
        if (gene %in% dimnames(interpolated_probs[[chr]])[[3]]) {
          gene_idx <- match(gene, dimnames(interpolated_probs[[chr]])[[3]])
          strain_matrix[gene, ] <- interpolated_probs[[chr]][strain_idx[1], , gene_idx]
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(strain_matrix)
}

# Cosine similarity per gene
cos_sim_per_gene = function(a, b) {
  v = rep(1L, ncol(a))
  numerator <- (a * b) %*% v
  denominator <- sqrt(a^2 %*% v * b^2 %*% v)
  
  gene_sims <- numerator / denominator
  gene_sims[is.nan(gene_sims)] <- 0
  
  return(gene_sims)
}

# ============================================================================
# MAIN ANALYSIS FUNCTION: JAX VS BENNETT
# ============================================================================

analyze_jax_vs_bennett <- function(jax_probs, bennett_probs, cc_pairs, 
                                   similarity_threshold, gene_coords, 
                                   output_dir, bin_size_mb = 5) {
  
  cat("\n==================================================\n")
  cat("CONTRAST 3: Jax vs Bennett Genotypes Analysis\n")
  cat("==================================================\n\n")
  
  results <- list()
  
  for (cross_name in names(cross_to_jax)) {
    jax_strain <- cross_to_jax[cross_name]
    bennett_strain <- cc_pairs[[jax_strain]]
    
    cat("Processing", cross_name, ":", jax_strain, "vs", bennett_strain, "\n")
    
    # Extract strain matrices
    jax_matrix <- extract_strain_probs(jax_probs, jax_strain)
    bennett_matrix <- extract_strain_probs(bennett_probs, bennett_strain)
    
    # Get common genes
    common_genes <- intersect(rownames(jax_matrix), rownames(bennett_matrix))
    
    if (length(common_genes) == 0) {
      cat("  No common genes found\n")
      next
    }
    
    # Subset to common genes
    jax_matrix <- jax_matrix[common_genes, ]
    bennett_matrix <- bennett_matrix[common_genes, ]
    
    # Remove zero rows
    non_zero_rows <- rowSums(jax_matrix) > 0 & rowSums(bennett_matrix) > 0
    jax_matrix <- jax_matrix[non_zero_rows, ]
    bennett_matrix <- bennett_matrix[non_zero_rows, ]
    
    cat("  Comparing", nrow(jax_matrix), "genes\n")
    
    # Calculate per-gene cosine similarity
    gene_sims <- cos_sim_per_gene(jax_matrix, bennett_matrix)
    
    # Create gene similarities data frame
    gene_similarities <- data.frame(
      gene = rownames(jax_matrix),
      similarity = as.vector(gene_sims),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # Map to chromosomes
    gene_coords$gene_id <- gene_coords$ensembl_gene_id
    
    # Filter to valid chromosomes only
    valid_chrs <- c(as.character(1:19), "X", "Y", "MT")
    
    gene_similarities <- gene_similarities %>%
      left_join(
        gene_coords %>% 
          dplyr::select(gene_id, chromosome_name, start_position, end_position),
        by = c("gene" = "gene_id")
      ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        midpoint_mb = (start_position + end_position) / 2000000,
        chromosome_name = as.character(chromosome_name)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::filter(chromosome_name %in% valid_chrs)  # Filter to standard chromosomes
    
    # Identify discordant genes (similarity < threshold)
    discordant_genes <- gene_similarities %>%
      dplyr::filter(similarity < similarity_threshold)
    
    cat("  Found", nrow(discordant_genes), "discordant genes\n")
    
    # Calculate per-chromosome statistics
    gene_similarities_df <- data.frame(
      gene = as.character(gene_similarities$gene),
      similarity = as.vector(gene_similarities$similarity),
      chromosome_name = as.character(gene_similarities$chromosome_name),
      midpoint_mb = gene_similarities$midpoint_mb,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    chr_summary <- gene_similarities_df %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(chromosome_name)) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(chromosome_name) %>%
      dplyr::summarize(
        total_genes = dplyr::n(),
        discordant_count = sum(similarity < similarity_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
        pct_discordant = (discordant_count / total_genes) * 100,
        .groups = 'drop'
      )
    
    # Create binned data for genomic visualization
    all_genes_by_chr <- gene_coords %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        midpoint_mb = (start_position + end_position) / 2000000,
        chromosome_name = as.character(chromosome_name)
      ) %>%
      split(.$chromosome_name)
    
    binned_data <- create_binned_data(discordant_genes, all_genes_by_chr, bin_size_mb)
    
    # Store results
    results[[cross_name]] <- list(
      cross_name = cross_name,
      jax_strain = jax_strain,
      bennett_strain = bennett_strain,
      gene_similarities = gene_similarities,
      discordant_genes = discordant_genes,
      chr_summary = chr_summary,
      binned_data = binned_data
    )
    
    # Save results for this cross
    cross_dir <- file.path(output_dir, cross_name)
    dir.create(cross_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
    
    # Save discordant genes
    write.csv(discordant_genes, 
             file.path(cross_dir, "all_discordant_genes_with_coords.csv"),
             row.names = FALSE)
    
    # Save chromosome summary
    write.csv(chr_summary,
             file.path(cross_dir, "chromosome_discordance_summary.csv"),
             row.names = FALSE)
    
    # Save binned data
    if (!is.null(binned_data)) {
      write.csv(binned_data,
               file.path(cross_dir, "binned_concordance_data.csv"),
               row.names = FALSE)
    }
    
    # Create visualizations
    create_visualizations(chr_summary, binned_data, cross_name, jax_strain, 
                         bennett_strain, cross_dir)
    
    cat("  Results saved to:", cross_dir, "\n\n")
  }
  
  # Create summary report
  create_summary_report(results, output_dir, similarity_threshold)
  
  return(results)
}

# ============================================================================
# BINNING FUNCTION
# ============================================================================

create_binned_data <- function(discordant_genes, all_genes_by_chr, bin_size_mb) {
  
  # Get unique discordant genes with positions
  unique_discordant_genes <- discordant_genes %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, chromosome_name, midpoint_mb) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(chromosome_name) & !is.na(midpoint_mb)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()
  
  if (nrow(unique_discordant_genes) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  chromosomes <- unique(unique_discordant_genes$chromosome_name)
  binned_results <- list()
  
  for (chr in chromosomes) {
    chr_all_genes <- all_genes_by_chr[[chr]]
    if (is.null(chr_all_genes) || nrow(chr_all_genes) == 0) {
      next
    }
    
    chr_discordant_genes <- unique_discordant_genes %>%
      dplyr::filter(chromosome_name == chr)
    
    min_pos <- floor(min(chr_all_genes$midpoint_mb) / bin_size_mb) * bin_size_mb
    max_pos <- ceiling(max(chr_all_genes$midpoint_mb) / bin_size_mb) * bin_size_mb
    bins <- seq(min_pos, max_pos, by = bin_size_mb)
    
    bin_data <- data.frame(
      chromosome_name = chr,
      position_bin = bins,
      position_bin_label = paste0(bins, "-", bins + bin_size_mb),
      total_gene_count = 0,
      discordant_count = 0,
      pct_concordance = 0
    )
    
    for (i in 1:length(bins)) {
      bin_start <- bins[i]
      bin_end <- bin_start + bin_size_mb
      
      bin_data$total_gene_count[i] <- sum(
        chr_all_genes$midpoint_mb >= bin_start & 
        chr_all_genes$midpoint_mb < bin_end
      )
      
      bin_data$discordant_count[i] <- sum(
        chr_discordant_genes$midpoint_mb >= bin_start & 
        chr_discordant_genes$midpoint_mb < bin_end
      )
    }
    
    bin_data <- bin_data %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        pct_concordance = ifelse(
          total_gene_count > 0,
          100 * (1 - (discordant_count / total_gene_count)),
          NA
        )
      )
    
    binned_results[[chr]] <- bin_data
  }
  
  if (length(binned_results) > 0) {
    return(do.call(rbind, binned_results))
  } else {
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# ============================================================================
# VISUALIZATION FUNCTIONS
# ============================================================================

create_visualizations <- function(chr_summary, binned_data, cross_name, 
                                 jax_strain, bennett_strain, output_dir) {
  
  # 1. Chromosome bar plot
  chr_plot <- ggplot(chr_summary, 
                    aes(x = reorder(chromosome_name, discordant_count), 
                        y = discordant_count)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "darkred", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = discordant_count), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Discordant Genes by Chromosome -", cross_name),
      subtitle = paste(jax_strain, "vs", bennett_strain),
      x = "Chromosome",
      y = "Number of Discordant Genes"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    )
  
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "discordant_genes_by_chromosome.pdf"),
         chr_plot, width = 12, height = 8)
  
  # 2. Concordance line plots by chromosome
  if (!is.null(binned_data) && nrow(binned_data) > 0) {
    chromosomes <- unique(binned_data$chromosome_name)
    
    chr_plots_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "Chromosome_Plots")
    dir.create(chr_plots_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
    
    for (chr in chromosomes) {
      chr_data <- binned_data %>%
        dplyr::filter(chromosome_name == chr, !is.na(pct_concordance))
      
      if (nrow(chr_data) > 0) {
        p <- ggplot(chr_data, aes(x = position_bin, y = pct_concordance)) +
          geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +
          geom_point(size = 2, color = "blue") +
          ylim(0, 100) +
          labs(
            title = paste("Gene Concordance - Chromosome", chr),
            subtitle = paste(cross_name, ":", jax_strain, "vs", bennett_strain),
            x = "Chromosome Position (Mb)",
            y = "% Concordance"
          ) +
          theme_minimal() +
          theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
            plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
          )
        
        ggsave(file.path(chr_plots_dir, paste0("concordance_chr", chr, ".pdf")),
               p, width = 10, height = 6)
      }
    }
  }
}

# ============================================================================
# SUMMARY REPORT
# ============================================================================

create_summary_report <- function(results, output_dir, similarity_threshold) {
  report_file <- file.path(output_dir, "Jax_vs_Bennett_Summary_Report.txt")
  
  sink(report_file)
  
  cat("JAX VS BENNETT GENOTYPE DISCORDANT GENE ANALYSIS\n")
  cat("================================================\n\n")
  cat("Analysis Date:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
  cat("Similarity Threshold:", similarity_threshold, "\n")
  cat("Comparison: Jax Consensus Genotypes vs Bennett Lab Genotypes\n\n")
  
  for (cross_name in names(results)) {
    result <- results[[cross_name]]
    
    cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
    cat("CROSS:", cross_name, "\n")
    cat("Jax Strain:", result$jax_strain, "\n")
    cat("Bennett Strain:", result$bennett_strain, "\n")
    cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n\n")
    
    cat("Total Genes Compared:", nrow(result$gene_similarities), "\n")
    cat("Discordant Genes:", nrow(result$discordant_genes), "\n")
    cat("Percent Discordant:", 
        round((nrow(result$discordant_genes) / nrow(result$gene_similarities)) * 100, 2),
        "%\n\n")
    
    cat("CHROMOSOME BREAKDOWN:\n")
    print(result$chr_summary)
    
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  # Overall summary
  total_discordant <- sum(sapply(results, function(x) nrow(x$discordant_genes)))
  total_compared <- sum(sapply(results, function(x) nrow(x$gene_similarities)))
  
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat("OVERALL SUMMARY\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n\n")
  cat("Total Genes Compared (across all crosses):", total_compared, "\n")
  cat("Total Discordant Genes (across all crosses):", total_discordant, "\n")
  cat("Average Percent Discordant:", 
      round((total_discordant / total_compared) * 100, 2), "%\n")
  
  sink()
  
  cat("\nSummary report saved to:", report_file, "\n")
}

# ============================================================================
# MAIN EXECUTION
# ============================================================================

run_jax_vs_bennett_analysis <- function() {
  
  cat("\n====================================================\n")
  cat("STARTING JAX VS BENNETT DISCORDANT GENE ANALYSIS\n")
  cat("====================================================\n\n")
  
  # Create output directory
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Load gene coordinates
  cat("Loading gene coordinates...\n")
  gene_coords <- load_gene_coordinates()
  
  # Check for required interpolated probabilities in environment
  if (!exists("CC_gene_interpolated_probs")) {
    stop("CC_gene_interpolated_probs (Jax) not found in environment")
  }
  
  if (!exists("CCDiet_gene_interpolated_probs")) {
    stop("CCDiet_gene_interpolated_probs (Bennett) not found in environment")
  }
  
  cat("Using CC_gene_interpolated_probs (Jax Consensus)\n")
  cat("Using CCDiet_gene_interpolated_probs (Bennett Lab)\n\n")
  
  # Run analysis
  results <- analyze_jax_vs_bennett(
    jax_probs = CC_gene_interpolated_probs,
    bennett_probs = CCDiet_gene_interpolated_probs,
    cc_pairs = cc_pairs,
    similarity_threshold = similarity_threshold,
    gene_coords = gene_coords,
    output_dir = output_dir,
    bin_size_mb = bin_size_mb
  )
  
  cat("\n====================================================\n")
  cat("JAX VS BENNETT ANALYSIS COMPLETE!\n")
  cat("====================================================\n")
  cat("Output directory:", output_dir, "\n")
  
  return(results)
}

# Execute the analysis
contrast3_results <- run_jax_vs_bennett_analysis()
```

### Contrast

```{r}
# All 3 contrasts: 
# 1. GBRS-derived vs Jax Consensus Genotypes
# 2. GBRS-derived vs Bennett Lab Genotypes
# 3. Jax Consensus Genotypes vs Bennett Lab Genotypes
# Main take away should be discordant genes span GBRS and genotyping contrasts (ie GBRS is reliable)

################################################################################
# Comprehensive Discordant Gene Comparison Analysis
# Compares existing results from: (1) GBRS vs Jax, (2) GBRS vs Bennett, (3) Jax vs Bennett
# NOTE: This assumes Contrast 3 has already been generated
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

# ============================================================================
# CONFIGURATION
# ============================================================================

# Base directory
base_dir <- "/project/do2_projects/AFRI/GBRS_development/Development"

# Paths to existing discordant results
contrast1_base <- file.path(base_dir, "Results/CC/CC_Discordant")  # GBRS vs Jax
contrast2_base <- file.path(base_dir, "Data/CCDiet/CCDiet_Comparison/CC/Discordant")  # GBRS vs Bennett
contrast3_base <- file.path(base_dir, "Results/Discordant_Comparison/Contrast3_Jax_vs_Bennett")  # Jax vs Bennett

# Output directory for this comparison analysis
output_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "Results/Discordant_Comparison")

# Crosses to analyze
crosses <- c("CC001xCC001", "CC019xCC019", "CC040xCC040")

# Similarity threshold for gene-level comparisons
similarity_threshold <- 0.7

# Sample-level discordance threshold for contrasts 1 & 2
# A gene must be discordant in this percentage of samples to be counted as discordant
sample_threshold_pct <- 50

# ============================================================================
# HELPER FUNCTIONS
# ============================================================================

# Function to filter discordant genes by sample threshold
filter_discordant_by_sample_threshold <- function(discordant_genes_df, 
                                                  sample_threshold_pct = 70) {
  # Count how many samples each gene is discordant in
  # Also count total samples in the cross
  total_samples <- length(unique(discordant_genes_df$sample_id))
  
  gene_sample_counts <- discordant_genes_df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(gene) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      n_samples_discordant = dplyr::n_distinct(sample_id),
      pct_samples_discordant = (dplyr::n_distinct(sample_id) / total_samples) * 100,
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  # Filter to genes that meet the threshold
  passing_genes <- gene_sample_counts %>%
    dplyr::filter(pct_samples_discordant >= sample_threshold_pct)
  
  # Filter the original data to only include these genes
  filtered_discordant <- discordant_genes_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene %in% passing_genes$gene)
  
  cat("  Total samples:", total_samples, "\n")
  cat("  Genes discordant in ANY sample:", nrow(gene_sample_counts), "\n")
  cat("  Genes discordant in ≥", sample_threshold_pct, "% of samples:", 
      nrow(passing_genes), "\n")
  
  return(list(
    filtered_discordant = filtered_discordant,
    gene_sample_counts = gene_sample_counts,
    passing_genes = passing_genes,
    total_samples = total_samples
  ))
}

# Load gene coordinates
load_gene_coordinates <- function() {
  if (exists("genes_with_id")) {
    gene_coords <- get("genes_with_id", envir = .GlobalEnv)
    
    # Filter to only include standard chromosomes (1-19, X, Y, MT)
    valid_chrs <- c(as.character(1:19), "X", "Y", "MT")
    gene_coords <- gene_coords %>%
      dplyr::filter(chromosome_name %in% valid_chrs)
    
    # Set chromosome order factor
    gene_coords$chromosome_name <- factor(gene_coords$chromosome_name,
                                          levels = c(as.character(1:19), "MT", "X", "Y"))
    
    cat("Filtered gene coordinates to standard chromosomes (1-19, MT, X, Y)\n")
    cat("Total genes after filtering:", nrow(gene_coords), "\n")
    
    return(gene_coords)
  } else {
    stop("Gene coordinates (genes_with_id) not found in environment.")
  }
}

# ============================================================================
# LOAD CONTRAST RESULTS
# ============================================================================

load_contrast_results <- function(contrast_base, crosses, contrast_name, 
                                 sample_threshold_pct = NULL) {
  cat("Loading", contrast_name, "results...\n")
  
  # Define valid chromosomes with proper ordering
  valid_chrs <- c(as.character(1:19), "MT", "X", "Y")
  
  results <- list()
  
  for (cross_name in crosses) {
    # Try to load the discordant genes file
    discordant_file <- file.path(contrast_base, cross_name, 
                                 "all_discordant_genes_with_coords.csv")
    chr_summary_file <- file.path(contrast_base, cross_name,
                                  "chromosome_discordance_summary.csv")
    
    if (file.exists(discordant_file) && file.exists(chr_summary_file)) {
      discordant_genes_raw <- read.csv(discordant_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      chr_summary <- read.csv(chr_summary_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      
      # Filter to only standard chromosomes and set factor levels
      discordant_genes_raw <- discordant_genes_raw %>%
        dplyr::filter(chromosome_name %in% valid_chrs) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(chromosome_name = factor(chromosome_name, levels = valid_chrs))
      
      chr_summary <- chr_summary %>%
        dplyr::filter(chromosome_name %in% valid_chrs) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(chromosome_name = factor(chromosome_name, levels = valid_chrs))
      
      cat("  ", cross_name, "- loaded", nrow(discordant_genes_raw), 
          "discordant gene entries (filtered to standard chromosomes)\n")
      
      # Apply sample threshold filter if provided (for contrasts 1 & 2)
      if (!is.null(sample_threshold_pct)) {
        cat("  Filtering by sample threshold (", sample_threshold_pct, "%):\n")
        filtered_results <- filter_discordant_by_sample_threshold(
          discordant_genes_raw, 
          sample_threshold_pct
        )
        
        results[[cross_name]] <- list(
          cross_name = cross_name,
          discordant_genes = filtered_results$filtered_discordant,
          gene_sample_counts = filtered_results$gene_sample_counts,
          passing_genes = filtered_results$passing_genes,
          total_samples = filtered_results$total_samples,
          chr_summary = chr_summary
        )
      } else {
        # No sample threshold (for contrast 3)
        results[[cross_name]] <- list(
          cross_name = cross_name,
          discordant_genes = discordant_genes_raw,
          chr_summary = chr_summary
        )
      }
      
    } else {
      cat("  Warning: Files not found for", cross_name, "\n")
    }
  }
  
  return(results)
}

# ============================================================================
# GENE-LEVEL OVERLAP ANALYSIS BY CHROMOSOME
# ============================================================================

analyze_gene_overlap_by_chromosome <- function(contrast1_results, contrast2_results, 
                                               contrast3_results, crosses, gene_coords) {
  cat("\n==================================================\n")
  cat("ANALYZING GENE OVERLAP BY CHROMOSOME\n")
  cat("==================================================\n\n")
  
  overlap_results <- list()
  
  for (cross_name in crosses) {
    cat("Analyzing", cross_name, "\n")
    
    # Get unique discordant genes from each contrast
    c1_genes <- unique(contrast1_results[[cross_name]]$discordant_genes$gene)
    c2_genes <- unique(contrast2_results[[cross_name]]$discordant_genes$gene)
    c3_genes <- unique(contrast3_results[[cross_name]]$discordant_genes$gene)
    
    cat("  C1 unique discordant genes:", length(c1_genes), "\n")
    cat("  C2 unique discordant genes:", length(c2_genes), "\n")
    cat("  C3 unique discordant genes:", length(c3_genes), "\n")
    
    # Get gene positions for chromosome assignment
    c1_positions <- gene_coords %>%
      dplyr::filter(ensembl_gene_id %in% c1_genes) %>%
      dplyr::select(gene_id = ensembl_gene_id, chromosome_name)
    
    c2_positions <- gene_coords %>%
      dplyr::filter(ensembl_gene_id %in% c2_genes) %>%
      dplyr::select(gene_id = ensembl_gene_id, chromosome_name)
    
    c3_positions <- gene_coords %>%
      dplyr::filter(ensembl_gene_id %in% c3_genes) %>%
      dplyr::select(gene_id = ensembl_gene_id, chromosome_name)
    
    # Analyze by chromosome
    chr_order <- c(as.character(1:19), "MT", "X", "Y")
    chromosomes_with_discordance <- unique(c(
      as.character(c1_positions$chromosome_name),
      as.character(c2_positions$chromosome_name),
      as.character(c3_positions$chromosome_name)
    ))
    chromosomes_with_discordance <- intersect(chr_order, chromosomes_with_discordance)
    
    chr_fisher_results <- list()
    
    for (chr in chromosomes_with_discordance) {
      # Get genes on this chromosome
      c1_chr_genes <- c1_positions %>% 
        dplyr::filter(as.character(chromosome_name) == chr) %>% 
        pull(gene_id)
      
      c2_chr_genes <- c2_positions %>% 
        dplyr::filter(as.character(chromosome_name) == chr) %>% 
        pull(gene_id)
      
      c3_chr_genes <- c3_positions %>% 
        dplyr::filter(as.character(chromosome_name) == chr) %>% 
        pull(gene_id)
      
      # Get total genes on this chromosome
      total_genes_chr <- gene_coords %>%
        dplyr::filter(as.character(chromosome_name) == chr) %>%
        nrow()
      
      # Calculate overlaps
      overlap_c1_c2 <- length(intersect(c1_chr_genes, c2_chr_genes))
      overlap_c1_c3 <- length(intersect(c1_chr_genes, c3_chr_genes))
      overlap_c2_c3 <- length(intersect(c2_chr_genes, c3_chr_genes))
      
      # Fisher's exact test for C1 vs C2
      # Contingency table:
      #                C2 discordant    C2 not discordant
      # C1 discordant      overlap         c1_only
      # C1 not disc.       c2_only         neither
      
      fisher_c1_c2 <- NULL
      if (length(c1_chr_genes) > 0 && length(c2_chr_genes) > 0) {
        cont_table <- matrix(c(
          overlap_c1_c2,  # both discordant
          length(c1_chr_genes) - overlap_c1_c2,  # C1 only
          length(c2_chr_genes) - overlap_c1_c2,  # C2 only
          total_genes_chr - length(c1_chr_genes) - length(c2_chr_genes) + overlap_c1_c2  # neither
        ), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
        
        fisher_c1_c2 <- tryCatch({
          fisher.test(cont_table)
        }, error = function(e) NULL)
      }
      
      # Fisher's exact test for C1 vs C3
      fisher_c1_c3 <- NULL
      if (length(c1_chr_genes) > 0 && length(c3_chr_genes) > 0) {
        cont_table <- matrix(c(
          overlap_c1_c3,
          length(c1_chr_genes) - overlap_c1_c3,
          length(c3_chr_genes) - overlap_c1_c3,
          total_genes_chr - length(c1_chr_genes) - length(c3_chr_genes) + overlap_c1_c3
        ), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
        
        fisher_c1_c3 <- tryCatch({
          fisher.test(cont_table)
        }, error = function(e) NULL)
      }
      
      # Fisher's exact test for C2 vs C3
      fisher_c2_c3 <- NULL
      if (length(c2_chr_genes) > 0 && length(c3_chr_genes) > 0) {
        cont_table <- matrix(c(
          overlap_c2_c3,
          length(c2_chr_genes) - overlap_c2_c3,
          length(c3_chr_genes) - overlap_c2_c3,
          total_genes_chr - length(c2_chr_genes) - length(c3_chr_genes) + overlap_c2_c3
        ), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
        
        fisher_c2_c3 <- tryCatch({
          fisher.test(cont_table)
        }, error = function(e) NULL)
      }
      
      chr_fisher_results[[chr]] <- data.frame(
        Chromosome = chr,
        Total_genes = total_genes_chr,
        C1_n = length(c1_chr_genes),
        C2_n = length(c2_chr_genes),
        C3_n = length(c3_chr_genes),
        C1_C2_overlap = overlap_c1_c2,
        C1_C2_pct = round((overlap_c1_c2 / min(length(c1_chr_genes), length(c2_chr_genes))) * 100, 1),
        C1_C2_pval = ifelse(is.null(fisher_c1_c2), NA, fisher_c1_c2$p.value),
        C1_C2_OR = ifelse(is.null(fisher_c1_c2), NA, fisher_c1_c2$estimate),
        C1_C3_overlap = overlap_c1_c3,
        C1_C3_pct = round((overlap_c1_c3 / min(length(c1_chr_genes), length(c3_chr_genes))) * 100, 1),
        C1_C3_pval = ifelse(is.null(fisher_c1_c3), NA, fisher_c1_c3$p.value),
        C1_C3_OR = ifelse(is.null(fisher_c1_c3), NA, fisher_c1_c3$estimate),
        C2_C3_overlap = overlap_c2_c3,
        C2_C3_pct = round((overlap_c2_c3 / min(length(c2_chr_genes), length(c3_chr_genes))) * 100, 1),
        C2_C3_pval = ifelse(is.null(fisher_c2_c3), NA, fisher_c2_c3$p.value),
        C2_C3_OR = ifelse(is.null(fisher_c2_c3), NA, fisher_c2_c3$estimate)
      )
    }
    
    # Combine results
    if (length(chr_fisher_results) > 0) {
      fisher_df <- do.call(rbind, chr_fisher_results)
      
      cat("\n  Chromosomes analyzed:", paste(chromosomes_with_discordance, collapse = ", "), "\n")
      cat("  Chromosomes with significant C1-C2 overlap (p<0.05):", 
          sum(fisher_df$C1_C2_pval < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
      cat("  Chromosomes with significant C1-C3 overlap (p<0.05):", 
          sum(fisher_df$C1_C3_pval < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
      cat("  Chromosomes with significant C2-C3 overlap (p<0.05):", 
          sum(fisher_df$C2_C3_pval < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")
      
      overlap_results[[cross_name]] <- list(
        fisher_tests = fisher_df,
        gene_lists = list(
          c1 = c1_positions,
          c2 = c2_positions,
          c3 = c3_positions
        )
      )
    } else {
      cat("  Insufficient data for Fisher's exact tests\n\n")
      overlap_results[[cross_name]] <- NULL
    }
  }
  
  return(overlap_results)
}

# ============================================================================
# CHROMOSOME-LEVEL COMPARISON TABLE
# ============================================================================

create_chromosome_comparison_table <- function(contrast1_results, contrast2_results,
                                              contrast3_results, crosses, gene_coords) {
  cat("\n==================================================\n")
  cat("CREATING CHROMOSOME-LEVEL COMPARISON TABLE\n")
  cat("==================================================\n\n")
  
  chr_tables <- list()
  
  # Define chromosome order
  chr_order <- c(as.character(1:19), "MT", "X", "Y")
  
  for (cross_name in crosses) {
    cat("Processing", cross_name, "\n")
    
    # Get discordant genes from each contrast
    c1_disc <- contrast1_results[[cross_name]]$discordant_genes
    c2_disc <- contrast2_results[[cross_name]]$discordant_genes
    c3_summary <- contrast3_results[[cross_name]]$chr_summary
    
    # Calculate chr summaries for C1 and C2 using unique genes
    gene_coords$gene_id <- gene_coords$ensembl_gene_id
    
    # C1: Count unique genes per chromosome
    c1_chr_summary <- c1_disc %>%
      dplyr::select(gene, chromosome_name) %>%
      dplyr::distinct() %>%
      dplyr::group_by(chromosome_name) %>%
      dplyr::summarize(C1_Discordant = dplyr::n(), .groups = 'drop')
    
    # C2: Count unique genes per chromosome
    c2_chr_summary <- c2_disc %>%
      dplyr::select(gene, chromosome_name) %>%
      dplyr::distinct() %>%
      dplyr::group_by(chromosome_name) %>%
      dplyr::summarize(C2_Discordant = dplyr::n(), .groups = 'drop')
    
    # C3: Extract and rename
    c3_chr_summary <- c3_summary %>%
      dplyr::select(chromosome_name, discordant_count) %>%
      dplyr::rename(C3_Discordant = discordant_count)
    
    # Get total genes per chromosome
    total_genes_chr <- gene_coords %>%
      dplyr::group_by(chromosome_name) %>%
      dplyr::summarize(total_genes = dplyr::n(), .groups = 'drop')
    
    # Merge all summaries
    chr_table <- total_genes_chr %>%
      dplyr::left_join(c1_chr_summary, by = "chromosome_name") %>%
      dplyr::left_join(c2_chr_summary, by = "chromosome_name") %>%
      dplyr::left_join(c3_chr_summary, by = "chromosome_name") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        C1_Discordant = ifelse(is.na(C1_Discordant), 0, C1_Discordant),
        C2_Discordant = ifelse(is.na(C2_Discordant), 0, C2_Discordant),
        C3_Discordant = ifelse(is.na(C3_Discordant), 0, C3_Discordant),
        C1_Pct = round((C1_Discordant / total_genes) * 100, 2),
        C2_Pct = round((C2_Discordant / total_genes) * 100, 2),
        C3_Pct = round((C3_Discordant / total_genes) * 100, 2),
        chromosome_name = factor(as.character(chromosome_name), levels = chr_order)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(chromosome_name)
    
    cat("  Total unique C1 discordant genes:", sum(chr_table$C1_Discordant), "\n")
    cat("  Total unique C2 discordant genes:", sum(chr_table$C2_Discordant), "\n")
    cat("  Total unique C3 discordant genes:", sum(chr_table$C3_Discordant), "\n\n")
    
    chr_tables[[cross_name]] <- chr_table
  }
  
  return(chr_tables)
}

# ============================================================================
# CREATE PUBLICATION-QUALITY TABLES
# ============================================================================

create_publication_tables <- function(chr_tables, gene_overlap_results, 
                                     crosses, output_dir,
                                     sample_threshold_pct) {
  cat("\n==================================================\n")
  cat("CREATING PUBLICATION-QUALITY TABLES\n")
  cat("==================================================\n\n")
  
  # Create output directories
  tables_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "Publication_Tables")
  dir.create(tables_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Load required library for table images
  library(gridExtra)
  library(grid)
  
  # Define chromosome order
  chr_order <- c(as.character(1:19), "MT", "X", "Y")
  
  # ========== TABLE 1: Comprehensive Chromosome-Level Comparison ==========
  for (cross_name in crosses) {
    chr_table <- chr_tables[[cross_name]]
    
    # Ensure proper chromosome ordering
    chr_table$chromosome_name <- factor(as.character(chr_table$chromosome_name), 
                                        levels = chr_order)
    chr_table <- chr_table %>% dplyr::arrange(chromosome_name)
    
    # Format for publication - organize columns: counts together, then percentages together
    pub_table <- chr_table %>%
      dplyr::mutate(chromosome_name = as.character(chromosome_name)) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        Chromosome = chromosome_name,
        `Total Genes` = total_genes,
        `GBRS vs Jax (n)` = C1_Discordant,
        `GBRS vs Bennett (n)` = C2_Discordant,
        `Jax vs Bennett (n)` = C3_Discordant,
        `GBRS vs Jax (%)` = C1_Pct,
        `GBRS vs Bennett (%)` = C2_Pct,
        `Jax vs Bennett (%)` = C3_Pct
      )
    
    # Add summary row - matching column order
    summary_row <- data.frame(
      Chromosome = "Total",
      `Total Genes` = sum(pub_table$`Total Genes`),
      `GBRS vs Jax (n)` = sum(pub_table$`GBRS vs Jax (n)`),
      `GBRS vs Bennett (n)` = sum(pub_table$`GBRS vs Bennett (n)`),
      `Jax vs Bennett (n)` = sum(pub_table$`Jax vs Bennett (n)`),
      `GBRS vs Jax (%)` = round(mean(pub_table$`GBRS vs Jax (%)`), 2),
      `GBRS vs Bennett (%)` = round(mean(pub_table$`GBRS vs Bennett (%)`), 2),
      `Jax vs Bennett (%)` = round(mean(pub_table$`Jax vs Bennett (%)`), 2),
      check.names = FALSE
    )
    
    pub_table <- rbind(pub_table, summary_row)
    
    # Save as CSV (keeping for data access)
    write.csv(pub_table, 
             file.path(tables_dir, paste0("Table1_Chromosome_Comparison_", cross_name, ".csv")),
             row.names = FALSE)
    
    # Create table as JPG image
    title_text <- paste0("Table 1: Chromosome-Level Discordant Gene Comparison - ", cross_name,
                        "\nNote: For GBRS vs Jax and GBRS vs Bennett, genes must be discordant in ≥",
                        sample_threshold_pct, "% of samples")
    
    table_grob <- tableGrob(pub_table, rows = NULL,
                           theme = ttheme_default(
                             base_size = 10,
                             core = list(bg_params = list(fill = c(rep("white", nrow(pub_table)-1), "lightgray"))),
                             colhead = list(bg_params = list(fill = "steelblue", col = "white"),
                                          fg_params = list(fontface = "bold"))
                           ))
    
    jpeg(file.path(tables_dir, paste0("Table1_Chromosome_Comparison_", cross_name, ".jpg")),
         width = 12, height = max(8, nrow(pub_table) * 0.3), units = "in", res = 300)
    grid.arrange(table_grob, top = textGrob(title_text, gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold")))
    dev.off()
    
    cat("  Created Table 1 for", cross_name, "\n")
  }
  
  # ========== TABLE 2: Gene Overlap Analysis by Chromosome ==========
  for (cross_name in crosses) {
    if (is.null(gene_overlap_results[[cross_name]])) {
      cat("  Skipping Table 2 for", cross_name, "(insufficient data)\n")
      next
    }
    
    fisher_data <- gene_overlap_results[[cross_name]]$fisher_tests
    
    # Create Fisher's test table with clear formatting
    fisher_table <- fisher_data %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        C1_C2_pval = ifelse(is.na(C1_C2_pval), "NA",
                           ifelse(C1_C2_pval < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", C1_C2_pval))),
        C1_C3_pval = ifelse(is.na(C1_C3_pval), "NA",
                           ifelse(C1_C3_pval < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", C1_C3_pval))),
        C2_C3_pval = ifelse(is.na(C2_C3_pval), "NA",
                           ifelse(C2_C3_pval < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", C2_C3_pval))),
        C1_C2_OR = ifelse(is.na(C1_C2_OR), "NA", sprintf("%.2f", C1_C2_OR)),
        C1_C3_OR = ifelse(is.na(C1_C3_OR), "NA", sprintf("%.2f", C1_C3_OR)),
        C2_C3_OR = ifelse(is.na(C2_C3_OR), "NA", sprintf("%.2f", C2_C3_OR))
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        Chromosome,
        `Total genes` = Total_genes,
        `C1 (n)` = C1_n,
        `C2 (n)` = C2_n,
        `C3 (n)` = C3_n,
        `C1-C2 overlap` = C1_C2_overlap,
        `C1-C2 (%)` = C1_C2_pct,
        `C1-C2 OR` = C1_C2_OR,
        `C1-C2 p` = C1_C2_pval,
        `C1-C3 overlap` = C1_C3_overlap,
        `C1-C3 (%)` = C1_C3_pct,
        `C1-C3 OR` = C1_C3_OR,
        `C1-C3 p` = C1_C3_pval,
        `C2-C3 overlap` = C2_C3_overlap,
        `C2-C3 (%)` = C2_C3_pct,
        `C2-C3 OR` = C2_C3_OR,
        `C2-C3 p` = C2_C3_pval
      )
    
    # Save table
    write.csv(fisher_table,
             file.path(tables_dir, paste0("Table2_Gene_Overlap_Fisher_", cross_name, ".csv")),
             row.names = FALSE)
    
    # Create table as JPG image
    title_text <- paste0("Table 2: Gene Overlap Analysis by Chromosome - ", cross_name)
    subtitle_text <- "Fisher's exact test for overlap between discordant gene lists (C1=GBRS vs Jax, C2=GBRS vs Bennett, C3=Jax vs Bennett)"
    
    # Create the main table
    table_grob <- tableGrob(fisher_table, rows = NULL,
                           theme = ttheme_default(
                             base_size = 12,
                             core = list(bg_params = list(fill = "white"),
```
