```{r}
                                        padding = unit(c(4, 4), "mm")),
                             colhead = list(bg_params = list(fill = "steelblue", col = "white"),
                                          fg_params = list(fontface = "bold"),
                                          padding = unit(c(4, 4), "mm"))
                           ))
    
    # Create figure with table spanning full width
    jpeg(file.path(tables_dir, paste0("Table2_Gene_Overlap_Fisher_", cross_name, ".jpg")),
         width = 18, height = max(10, nrow(fisher_table) * 0.45 + 2.5), units = "in", res = 300)
    
    grid.newpage()
    pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(3, 1, 
                                                heights = unit(c(1, 0.8, 1), c("inches", "inches", "null")))))
    
    # Title
    grid.text(title_text, 
             vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1),
             gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
    
    # Subtitle
    grid.text(subtitle_text, 
             vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1),
             gp = gpar(fontsize = 12))
    
    # Table - add some margin
    pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 3, layout.pos.col = 1))
    pushViewport(viewport(width = 0.95, height = 0.95))
    grid.draw(table_grob)
    popViewport(2)
    
    dev.off()
    
    cat("  Created Table 2 (Gene Overlap Fisher's Tests) for", cross_name, "\n")
  }
  
  # ========== COMBINED TABLE: All Crosses Side-by-Side ==========
  combined_chr_table <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(chr_tables), function(cross_name) {
    chr_table <- chr_tables[[cross_name]]
    chr_table$chromosome_name <- factor(as.character(chr_table$chromosome_name), 
                                        levels = chr_order)
    chr_table %>%
      dplyr::arrange(chromosome_name) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        Cross = cross_name,
        chromosome_name = as.character(chromosome_name)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        Cross,
        Chromosome = chromosome_name,
        `Total Genes` = total_genes,
        `GBRS vs Jax (n)` = C1_Discordant,
        `GBRS vs Bennett (n)` = C2_Discordant,
        `Jax vs Bennett (n)` = C3_Discordant,
        `GBRS vs Jax (%)` = C1_Pct,
        `GBRS vs Bennett (%)` = C2_Pct,
        `Jax vs Bennett (%)` = C3_Pct
      )
  }))
  
  write.csv(combined_chr_table,
           file.path(tables_dir, "Table_Combined_All_Crosses_Chromosomes.csv"),
           row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Create combined table as HTML
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)
  
  title_text_combined <- "Chromosome-Level Comparison Across All Crosses"
  
  html_table <- combined_chr_table %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, align = "c",
          caption = title_text_combined) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive"),
                  full_width = FALSE,
                  font_size = 12) %>%
    row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "steelblue") %>%
    column_spec(1, bold = TRUE, background = "#f0f0f0")
  
  # Save HTML file
  html_output <- paste0(
    "<!DOCTYPE html>\n",
    "<html>\n",
    "<head>\n",
    "<meta charset='utf-8'>\n",
    "<title>", title_text_combined, "</title>\n",
    "<style>\n",
    "body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; margin: 20px; }\n",
    "h1 { color: #333; text-align: center; }\n",
    "table { margin: 20px auto; border-collapse: collapse; }\n",
    "</style>\n",
    "</head>\n",
    "<body>\n",
    "<h1>", title_text_combined, "</h1>\n",
    html_table,
    "\n</body>\n</html>"
  )
  
  writeLines(html_output, 
             file.path(tables_dir, "Table_Combined_All_Crosses_Chromosomes.html"))
  
  cat("\n  Created combined tables for all crosses\n")
  cat("  All publication tables saved to:", tables_dir, "\n")
  cat("  Combined table saved as HTML for interactive viewing\n")
}

# ============================================================================
# MAIN EXECUTION
# ============================================================================

run_comprehensive_comparison <- function() {
  
  cat("\n====================================================\n")
  cat("COMPREHENSIVE DISCORDANT GENE COMPARISON ANALYSIS\n")
  cat("====================================================\n\n")
  
  # Create output directory
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Load gene coordinates
  cat("Loading gene coordinates...\n")
  gene_coords <- load_gene_coordinates()
  
  # Load all three contrasts
  contrast1_results <- load_contrast_results(
    contrast_base = contrast1_base,
    crosses = crosses,
    contrast_name = "GBRS vs Jax",
    sample_threshold_pct = sample_threshold_pct
  )
  
  contrast2_results <- load_contrast_results(
    contrast_base = contrast2_base,
    crosses = crosses,
    contrast_name = "GBRS vs Bennett",
    sample_threshold_pct = sample_threshold_pct
  )
  
  contrast3_results <- load_contrast_results(
    contrast_base = contrast3_base,
    crosses = crosses,
    contrast_name = "Jax vs Bennett",
    sample_threshold_pct = NULL  # No sample threshold for strain-level comparison
  )
  
  # Gene overlap analysis by chromosome with Fisher's exact tests
  gene_overlap_results <- analyze_gene_overlap_by_chromosome(
    contrast1_results = contrast1_results,
    contrast2_results = contrast2_results,
    contrast3_results = contrast3_results,
    crosses = crosses,
    gene_coords = gene_coords
  )
  
  # Chromosome-level comparison table
  chr_tables <- create_chromosome_comparison_table(
    contrast1_results = contrast1_results,
    contrast2_results = contrast2_results,
    contrast3_results = contrast3_results,
    crosses = crosses,
    gene_coords = gene_coords
  )
  
  # Create publication tables
  create_publication_tables(
    chr_tables = chr_tables,
    gene_overlap_results = gene_overlap_results,
    crosses = crosses,
    output_dir = output_dir,
    sample_threshold_pct = sample_threshold_pct
  )
  
  # Save summary report
  create_summary_report(
    gene_overlap_results = gene_overlap_results,
    chr_tables = chr_tables,
    crosses = crosses,
    output_dir = output_dir,
    sample_threshold_pct = sample_threshold_pct,
    similarity_threshold = similarity_threshold
  )
  
  cat("\n====================================================\n")
  cat("COMPREHENSIVE ANALYSIS COMPLETE!\n")
  cat("====================================================\n")
  cat("Output directory:", output_dir, "\n")
  cat("Publication tables:", file.path(output_dir, "Publication_Tables"), "\n")
  
  return(list(
    contrast1 = contrast1_results,
    contrast2 = contrast2_results,
    contrast3 = contrast3_results,
    gene_overlap = gene_overlap_results,
    chr_tables = chr_tables
  ))
}

# Helper function for summary report
create_summary_report <- function(gene_overlap_results, chr_tables, crosses, 
                                 output_dir, sample_threshold_pct, similarity_threshold) {
  
  report_file <- file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_Analysis_Report.txt")
  sink(report_file)
  
  cat("COMPREHENSIVE DISCORDANT GENE COMPARISON\n")
  cat("========================================\n\n")
  cat("Analysis Date:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
  cat("Similarity Threshold:", similarity_threshold, "\n")
  cat("Sample Threshold (Contrasts 1 & 2):", sample_threshold_pct, 
      "% of samples must show discordance\n\n")
  
  cat("NOTE: For Contrasts 1 & 2 (GBRS vs Jax, GBRS vs Bennett),\n")
  cat("a gene is only counted as discordant if it shows discordance\n")
  cat("in ≥", sample_threshold_pct, "% of samples within that cross.\n\n")
  
  for (cross_name in crosses) {
    cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
    cat("CROSS:", cross_name, "\n")
    cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n\n")
    
    # Gene overlap summary
    if (!is.null(gene_overlap_results[[cross_name]])) {
      cat("GENE OVERLAP ANALYSIS (Fisher's Exact Tests):\n\n")
      fisher_df <- gene_overlap_results[[cross_name]]$fisher_tests
      print(fisher_df)
      
      cat("\n\nSUMMARY:\n")
      cat("Chromosomes with significant overlap (p<0.05):\n")
      cat("  C1-C2 (GBRS vs Jax / GBRS vs Bennett):", 
          sum(fisher_df$C1_C2_pval < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(fisher_df), "\n")
      cat("  C1-C3 (GBRS vs Jax / Jax vs Bennett):", 
          sum(fisher_df$C1_C3_pval < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(fisher_df), "\n")
      cat("  C2-C3 (GBRS vs Bennett / Jax vs Bennett):", 
          sum(fisher_df$C2_C3_pval < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(fisher_df), "\n")
      
      cat("\nMean odds ratios (where p<0.05):\n")
      cat("  C1-C2:", round(mean(fisher_df$C1_C2_OR[fisher_df$C1_C2_pval < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
      cat("  C1-C3:", round(mean(fisher_df$C1_C3_OR[fisher_df$C1_C3_pval < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
      cat("  C2-C3:", round(mean(fisher_df$C2_C3_OR[fisher_df$C2_C3_pval < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
    } else {
      cat("GENE OVERLAP ANALYSIS: Insufficient data\n")
    }
    
    cat("\n\nCHROMOSOME-LEVEL SUMMARY:\n")
    print(chr_tables[[cross_name]])
    
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  sink()
  
  cat("Summary report generated at:", report_file, "\n")
}

# Execute analysis
comprehensive_results <- run_comprehensive_comparison()
```
